title: Replace all 'Marina Vasquez' name references with 'Susan Richten'

requirements.text: Search the entire frontend codebase for any string literal, default value, placeholder text, sample data, or comment that contains the name 'Marina Vasquez' and replace every occurrence with 'Susan Richten'. This includes but is not limited to: CMSContext default/sample data (frontend/src/contexts/CMSContext.tsx), HeroEditor defaults (frontend/src/components/admin/HeroEditor.tsx), Header logo/wordmark (frontend/src/components/Header.tsx), Footer brand name (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx), HTML page title (frontend/index.html), testimonial sample data, press mention sample data, blog post sample data, artwork sample data, any admin page labels, and any other component or file where 'Marina Vasquez' appears as a hardcoded string.

quotes: Replace all names of "Marina Vasquez" and replace them with "Susan Richten"

acceptanceCriteria: A full-text search of the frontend source tree for 'Marina Vasquez' returns zero matches.
All locations that previously displayed 'Marina Vasquez' now display 'Susan Richten'.
No other content, logic, or styling is changed as a result of this replacement.
The Footer brand name displays 'Susan Richten'.
The HTML <title> in frontend/index.html does not contain 'Marina Vasquez'.
CMS default/sample data (artworks, testimonials, blog posts, site settings) contains no 'Marina Vasquez' references.

constraints: Only replace the name string 'Marina Vasquez' with 'Susan Richten'. Do not alter any other content, logic, styling, or data structures.
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Changing any other artist metadata, biography content, or CMS sample data beyond the name string.
Modifying backend Motoko code unless 'Marina Vasquez' appears there.
Altering page layout, styling, or component logic.
